project_area: charitable projects addressing Philadelphia’s greatest areas of need and aligning with the City of Philadelphia’s goals to improve quality of life
demographic_requirements: projects serving Philadelphians, with a focus on health equity, youth enrichment, and out-of-school time programming
eligibility_summary: Open to community organizations and nonprofit organizations in Philadelphia. Projects must align with the City of Philadelphia’s goals to improve quality of life and address areas of need. Recent grantees in good standing may be eligible for general operating grants.
